hero.headline: Vue.js engineer, 7 years shipping
hero.bio: **Lucas Barbosa** — front-end engineer focused on Vue.js, modular architecture, and design systems. Currently scaling a Vue/TypeScript stack across 13+ active products at Sysvale Health Tech.

about.title: A bit about
about.p1: I'm a front-end engineer from Petrolina, working at Sysvale Health Tech in Juazeiro since 2018 — first as an intern, now helping lead the front-end architecture. I came in curious and stayed because the problems keep getting interesting.
about.p2: I work mostly with Vue 2/3, TypeScript, and Cuida — an open-source design system I helped build from its early stages, now shared across 10+ products. I also designed and introduced a standardized Vue 3 project architecture that has been successfully adopted as the baseline for over 10 new applications.

skills.title: What I work
skills.note: Levels are vibes-based, not certifications. If you want to see something specific in action, it's probably in the work section above.
